name: ai.quickdeploy/admin
title: QuickDeploy Admin
description: Org and enterprise governance for QuickDeploy AI: list and evaluate policies, review and decide approval requests, manage cost budgets and caps, and page signed audit events.

environmentVariables.name: QDAI_API_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: QuickDeploy service-account bearer token with policies/approvals/costs/events scopes (see https://api.quickdeploy.ai/auth.md).

environmentVariables.name: QDAI_API_BASE
environmentVariables.description: Control-Plane API origin override. Defaults to https://api.quickdeploy.ai.
